message:
Here's a little detail that makes your dog truly one of a kind — quite literally. 🐾

Just like our fingerprints, every dog's nose has its own pattern of tiny ridges and bumps, and no two are exactly alike. It's so distinctive that some pet registries have actually used nose prints to help identify lost dogs and reunite them with their families.

So that cold, boopable little snoot pressing into your hand? It's the only one like it in the entire world. 💛

Give your pup a boop from us — and tell us, does YOUR dog love a good nose boop or dodge it every time? 🐶
